name: Comparison view and CSV export are available on the dashboard
description: With saved project history, the dashboard shows a side-by-side comparison view and an Export CSV control.

planSteps.description: Click the 'Sign in' button (or 'Get started') to open the sign-in dialog
Type a valid email address (for example demo@churnsense.app) into the sign-in email field in the dialog
Click the button that enters the dashboard
Scroll down to find the 'Compare projects' section
Verify a 'Compare projects' section is visible with two project selectors and a table of metric rows (Churn Rate, Retention, ARPU)
Verify an 'Export CSV' button is visible in the top navigation bar
